            category="zeta",
            manufacturer="acme",
            host=host,
            capacity=1,
        )
        create_unit(
            entrypoint_argv,
            data_dir,
            category="alpha",
            manufacturer="acme",
            host=host,
            capacity=1,
        )
        alpha_a = create_unit(
            entrypoint_argv,
            data_dir,
            category="alpha",
            manufacturer="acme-a",
            host=host,
            capacity=2,
        )
        alpha_b = create_unit(
            entrypoint_argv,
            data_dir,
            category="alpha",
            manufacturer="acme-b",
            host=host,
            capacity=2,
        )
        shared_timestamp = "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z"
        store_path = data_dir / "units.json"
        stored = json.loads(store_path.read_text())
        for row in stored:
            if row["uuid"] in {alpha_a["uuid"], alpha_b["uuid"]}:
                row["created_at"] = shared_timestamp
        store_path.write_text(
            json.dumps(stored, separators=(",", ":"), sort_keys=True)
        )
    
        listed = run_forge(
